# mtncloud_network (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud network by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_network" "shared" {
  name = "shared-services"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the network to look up.

### Optional

- `cloud_id` (Number) Cloud/zone ID to disambiguate networks with the same name. Get it from mtncloud_group.cloud_ids.

### Read-Only

- `cidr` (String) CIDR block of the network.
- `code` (String) Code of the network.
- `gateway` (String) Gateway address of the network.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the network.
- `status` (String) Current status of the network.
- `type_id` (Number) ID of the network type.
